name: Cox's Bazar
description: Cox's Bazar is the longest natural sea beach in the world, stretching over 120 kilometers along the Bay of Bengal.

name: Sreemangal
description: Sreemangal is known as the tea capital of Bangladesh.

name: Sundarbans
description: The Sundarbans is the largest mangrove forest in the world.

name: Bandarban
description: Bandarban is one of the most beautiful hill districts in Bangladesh.

name: Saint Martin
description: Saint Martin is the only coral island in Bangladesh.

name: Rangamati
description: Rangamati is a beautiful hill district.
